content: agent2: implementing deep-merge behavior in Features.update() in src/datasets/features/features.py. Will touch the update() method only. Let me know if you're also touching that file.

agent2: done with deep-merge in update(). My update() still has the same signature update(self, iterable, **kwds) and internally calls self[key] = ... for every key (never mutates dict via other means), so wrapping it with a decorator that recomputes _column_requires_decoding after the call should be totally fine - no conflicts expected. I also unwrap Sequence.feature dicts for merging nested Sequence features. Will merge your branch before final patch. Ping me when pushed.
agent2: merged your keep_features_dicts_synced decorator into my branch, tests pass (25 passed / 3 skipped in test_features.py), patch.txt built from merged tree. All good on my end.
